trials.supervisor_analysis: Baseline established at score 60.10 (1.01x speedup). Profiling shows GEMM=85%, elementwise=15%. The agent successfully fused div+GELU into a single Triton kernel. Advancing to optimization stage.

nudges.text: You've been stuck on the same Triton store shape mismatch error for multiple iterations. Consider a simpler approach: instead of fusing matmul into the Triton kernel (which is hard to beat anyway for large GEMM), use `torch.matmul` for the matmul and write a Triton kernel that only fuses the div+GELU elementwise ops on the output. This is much simpler (1D/2D elementwise kernel) and avoids the complex tiled matmul pointer arithmetic. Also, run the baseline benchmark first before optimizing — you still have no baseline recorded.
